description: Style Note This casual T-shirt is an excellent addition to your casual wardrobe. Excellent when the temperatures drop, or you can roll up the sleeves for a more funky look. This T-shirt can be paired with jeans and sneakers and get the casual sporty look just right with this T-shirt from spykar. Product Details Red T-shirt, has a round ribbed neckline, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and graphic print on the chest with branding appliquéd Material and Care 100% cotton Hand wash cold Flat dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
